Archangels present:

Michael Morningstar:

Michael is the Archangel of War.

Azrael is the Archangel of Death.

Gabriel Morningstar:

Gabriel is the Archangel of the Message.

Raphael Morningstar:

Raphael is the Archangel of Healing.

Cassius Morningstar:

Cassius is the Archangel of the Ecosystem.

Leonardo Morningstar:

Leonardo is the Archangel of Life.

Galim Morningstar:

Galim is the Archangel of Justice.
